name: Container glas kapot
instructions: Classify as 'Container glas kapot' if the melding text describes a broken glass container.

name: Container glas vol
instructions: Classify as 'Container glas vol' if the melding text describes a full glass container.

name: Container is kapot
instructions: Classify as 'Container is kapot' if the melding text describes a broken container (not limited to glass).
